title: scrophularia kermanica
intro: Scrophularia kermanica, also known as Iranian figwort, is a flowering plant species in the figwort family, native to the southwestern region of Iran. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for various health applications, with the tea often being used to treat colds and flu.
